# Prediction and Learning {#part-prediction-and-learning .unnumbered}

This part follows the model from final hidden states to training updates.
It explains how GPT chooses the next token, measures mistakes, and changes its weights.

- In @sec-ch11-vocab-projection, the final vector becomes logits and next-token probabilities.
- In @sec-ch12-loss, predictions become a scalar training signal through cross-entropy and perplexity.
- In @sec-ch13-training, gradients and weight updates connect the loss back to the model parameters.
